description:
Check the drug-drug interaction safety profile between the cancer drug 'Lorlatinib' and three respiratory medications: 'Salbutamol' (or Albuterol), 'Theophylline', and 'Montelukast' using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Create a report file at '/sdcard/respiratory_check.txt' with the following format, replacing [COLOR] with the traffic light color (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey) shown for each interaction:

Lorlatinib Respiratory Safety Report
Salbutamol: [COLOR]
Theophylline: [COLOR]
Montelukast: [COLOR]
